entities.name: V
entities.context: Subject of the urge check-in protocol

entities.name: Non-judgment
entities.context: Approach to handling situations without criticism - 'No judgment here'

entities.name: Compassion
entities.context: Self-care orientation in the protocol - asking what V needs

entities.name: Pattern capture
entities.context: Saving data for future pattern recognition

entities.name: Grounding
entities.context: Helping V feel present and stable during closing

entities.name: Check-in protocol
entities.context: Multi-step process for handling urges with buckets to cover

entities.name: Save Protocol
entities.context: Markdown summary compilation with date, urge type, intensity, triggers, needs, sensations, decision, outcome

entities.name: Database
entities.context: Storage destination for compiled check-in summaries

entities.name: Follow-up check-in
entities.context: Optional 30-60 minute follow-up offered at closing

relationships.context: V is the subject who goes through the urge check-in process
Non-judgment is a core principle in the check-in approach
Compassion guides the self-care questions in the protocol
Pattern capture is step 5 - saving data even after acting on urge
Grounding is step 2 of the closing sequence
Compiled markdown summary is saved to database
Save Protocol executes at completion of check-in
Pattern capture feeds into the save protocol for future recognition
